message: Initialized compliance and IAP planning artifacts before implementation.
Implemented ATT, permission keys, protocol WebView, relative media storage, upload, and album export.
Implemented 27-product Store, lazy IAP service, idempotent credit ledger, global balance entry, and fixed 10-credit spend point.
Static analysis, tests, and iOS simulator build passed.
Compliance tracker, IAP tracker, test matrix, feature coverage, and layout audit updated.
